name: Iced Vanilla Coffee
directions: Put the first 5 ingredients into a blender.
Pulse blend until the ingredients are smooth and frothy.
Add the cold milk and pulse blend until all the ingredients are blended well.
Pour of a few cubes of ice, add the chocolate and voula!
Sometimes I add the ice to the blender after the first five ingredients have been blended and crush the ice and then add the milk and mix.

name: Hot Tom & Jerry
directions: Tom & Jerry Mix----------.
Beat the egg whites until stiff froth.
Gradually beat in the sugar.
Beat the egg yolks until very light.
Gradually fold in the yolks with the whites.
Beat and place in a clear glass bowl.
Tom & Jerry Drinks---------.
In each cup put mix, brandy and rum.
Fill with boiling water, stir and sprinkle nutmeg on top and Cheemo!

name: Iced Chai Tea
directions: Combine all the ingredients, except the cinnamon in a saucepan, bring to a boil stirring frequently.
Remove from heat, let stand 3-4 minutes, Remove the tea bags.
Chill in the fridge.
Serve over ice cubes with a sprinkle of cinnamon.

name: French Vanilla (Ice Cap.)
directions: Place ice cubes and milk in a electric blender and mix for 1 min or until smooth.
Add Instant coffee powder, Vanilla, Sugar and mix until foamy (approximately 1 minute) Pour in a tall glass.

name: Caesar
directions: Rim glass with Celery Salt.
Starting with Clamato add all ingredients to glass.
Stir and add Celery stalk.
Sip with a straw and enjoy!

name: Prairie Fire
directions: Pour Tequila in shot glass.
Splash in Tabasco.
Squeeze lemon wedge into it.
Put it back in one swallow.

name: Peppermint Patty Liqueur
directions: Whisk ingredients together in a large measuring cup.
Pour into decorative bottles, seal & refrigerate for up to 2 weeks.

similar.name: Gone Wild on a Satin Pillow

name: Coffee Liqueur
directions: Combine sugar & water in a saucepan; bring to a boil, stirring constantly, until sugar is dissolved.
stir in coffee granules; reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, stirring frequently, for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat & cool to room temperature; stir in remaining ingredients.
Pour into decorative bottles & seal tightly; store in a cool, dark place for 4 - 6 weeks before serving.

name: Amaretto Cow
directions: Fill an old-fashioned glass with ice, add Amaretto and cream, stir.
Garnish with maraschino cherries on a plastic sword or stick.
Enjoy!

name: Baby's Bottom
directions: In a mixing glass half-filled with ice cubes, combine all ingredients.
Stir well.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

similar.name: Gone Wild on a Satin Pillow

name: Canadian Slipper
directions: Combine first 5 ingredients in a shaker and shake once.
Pour into a highball glass with ice cubes.
Top with whipped cream, and serve.

similar.name: Gone Wild on a Satin Pillow

name: Smith and Kearns
directions: Combine all in high ball glass and add ice.
ENJOY.

name: Caesar Cocktail "lunch"
directions: Run lemon around the rim of a 8-10 oz stemmed glass.
Crust glass rim with celery salt.
Add hot sauce to glass, then ice.
Add Vodka and lemon juice.
Salt briefly with celery salt.
Pour in 1/2 of the Clamato Juice.
Add more celery salt.
Add remainder of Clamato Juice.
Add more celery salt.
Add lemon or lime wedge.
Stir with celery rib, and stire briefly to mix.
Assemble remaining ingredients on a small bamboo skewer, and hang above the glass rim as serving.

name: Wild Orchid Martini
directions: Combine ingredients in a shaker.
Stirred, not shaken.
Pour into martini glasses.
Attach a small orchid to rim of glass.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Gone Wild on a Satin Pillow

name: Cocotini
directions: Shake in a shaker and pour in martini glass.

similar.name: Gone Wild on a Satin Pillow

name: BBQ Bloody Caesar
directions: DIRECTIONS for Fire Roasted Tomatoes:
Preheat grill to medium-high (about 400°).
In a large bowl, toss tomatoes in Bonedust Seasoning and 2 tbsp olive oil.
Place tomatoes on grill, skin side down, and roast for 10 minutes, or until skins are charred and blistered. Remove from grill and cool.
DIRECTIONS for Bloody Caesar:
In a blender, combine fire-roasted tomatoes, vodka, Jack Daniel's, Clamato juice, Worcestershire and Tabasco sauces, and horseradish. Blend thoroughly; season with salt and pepper to taste.
Pour enough Bonedust Seasoning into a saucer to cover the surface. Run a lime wedge around the rim of each of two large glasses and dip rims into Bonedust Seasoning.
Fill glasses with ice and pour blended mixture into glasses.
Garnish each with a skewered pepperoncini and a wedge of lime.

name: Black Magic Coffee, Sugar Free-Fat Free
directions: Pour fresh coffee into mug.
Add the extracts and Splenda.
Stir and enjoy!

similar.name: Sugar Free-Fat Free- Cinnamon Hot Chocolate Mix

name: Harley Davidson Shot (Shooter)
directions: In a mixing tin add baileys irish cream and midori melon liqueur over ice. Stir and strain into a 4 oz. rocks glass, top with jagermeister, and serve.

similar.name: Gone Wild on a Satin Pillow

name: Bar Blend Classic Caesar
directions: Place lime juice in saucer or small bowl.  Make sure top of glass will fit inside.
Place celery salt in saucer.
Dip glass in lime juice just to wet rim.  Dip rim into celery salt.
Fill glass with ice.  Add vodka, clamato, tabasco & worcestershire sauce.
Stir gently so as to not mar rim trim.
Trim glass with a slice of lemon and a slice of lime.  Pop in a hot pickled bean or hot pickled asparagus spear.

name: Kolky's Signature Blend Caesar
directions: For rim trim - place lime juice and celery salt in separate saucers.  Dip beer mug in lime juice first then into celery salt.
Fill mug with ice.
For best results, place vodka, tabasco, chipotle tabasco, liquid smoke, bbq sauce and worcestershire in a shaker or separate glass.  Mix WELL!
Pour over ice and top with clamato juice. Stir gently to avoid marring rim trim.
Trim glass with a slice of lemon and a slice of lime.  Pop in a spear of hot picklet asparagus or hot pickled bean.
Enjoy!

name: Love Passion
directions: In a champagne flute, combine gin and liqueur and top off with champagne.
Garnish drink with raspberries.

similar.name: Gone Wild on a Satin Pillow

name: Coffee With a Butterscotch Twist
directions: In a large bowl, stir the coffee with butterscotch chips until chips are melted.
Stir in half and half.
Add sugar.
Serve in mugs with whipped cream.

name: Crown and Coke
directions: Pour Crown Royal whisky over ice cubes in highball glass.
Add cola and stir.

name: Canadian Whiskey Sour
directions: Shake all ingredients together.
Pour into a glass and enjoy!

name: Sugar Free-Fat Free- Cinnamon Hot Chocolate Mix
ingredients: fat-free sugar-free instant chocolate pudding mix
directions: Mix all ingredients together and place in an airtight container.
To make hot chocolate, use 1/4 c mix and 1 C hot water.
Number of Servings: 18.

similar.name: Black Magic Coffee, Sugar Free-Fat Free

name: Fallen Red Cedar
directions: Muddle the strawberries in a bit of crushed ice.
Put berries, lemon juice and vodka into a shaker, shake vigorously until well mixed.
Pour into an old fashioned tumbler over ice cubes.
Add a splash of champagne ( soda will also work).
Garnish with a slice of strawberry and a fat straw.

name: The Three Tastes of Temptation
directions: Brew the coffee, plus extra to drink, as desired.
In 4 glass tumblers, place one scoop of the vanilla ice cream topped with the chocolate ice cream.
Slowly pour the coffee over that, add a heaping tablespoon of the whipped cream and serve immediately.
Of COURSE this can be doubled!

similar.name: Gone Wild on a Satin Pillow

name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Kiss Caffe
directions: Unwrap the kisses, or kiss, and place in bottom of your cup.
Pour the hot coffee over the candy.
Put a spoon in the cup and top with any or all of the optional toppings.
*TIP:  I always keep my chocolate in the freezer and a kiss will grate nicely right from the freezer.

similar.name: Gone Wild on a Satin Pillow

name: Grampa Doogin Cocktail
directions: Layer whiskey on the bottom of an old-fashioned glass, add the blueberry then the orange juice. Top with cranberry juice.

name: Maple Leaf Cocktail
directions: To make the maple leaf cocktail, combine the bourbon, maple syrup, and lemon juice in a cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake and strain into a cocktail glass. Garnish with the cinnamon stick.
Mix, shake, repeat as often as the party requires.

name: Gone Wild on a Satin Pillow
directions: Mix everything up to the nutmeg.
Stir or shake well until sugar has dissolved.
Place in two small martini style glasses or over shaved ice in a small glass.
Add a dash of nutmeg on top.
Enjoy.

name: Devine Orange
directions: Combine orange juice, Grand Marnier, rum, frozen cranberries, all spice and cloves in a small saucepan.
Gently warm the ingredients so that the cranberries feel soft.
Do not allow the ingredients to boil.
Ladle the warm cocktail into the mug (preferably an Irish coffee mug).
Serve with cinnamon stick in the mug.
